product.problem: Build an API that stores submitted records durably.
goals: Accept records and make them queryable
core_flows: A client submits a record and later queries it
data_model_draft: Record with id, payload, and created timestamp
success_criteria: Records can be created and fetched

data_flow: Requests validate input, write to storage, and return persisted records
verification: Integration tests cover create and fetch

clarifying_question_disposition.rationale: The target runtime question is resolved by the selected v1 runtime decision.
The approved v1 scope keeps Redis as behavior inspiration while excluding protocol and server compatibility.
clarifying_question_disposition.non_goal: No Redis protocol compatibility and no network server in v1

evidence.title: Fixture scope
evidence.used_for: Confirmed durable API storage is in scope.
